pr.title: feat: RLS migration, Apollo/Resend hooks, sticky A/B price, cron quot…
pr.body:
…a continue

- Add Supabase migration for RLS policies (JWT sub = clerk_user_id), outbound_logs
- Document RLS + optional Clerk JWT client (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
- Optional Apollo mixed_people import in /api/ai/prospects with AI fallback
- Resend helper and POST /api/outbound/email with logging
- Sticky A/B pricing via proposed_price_cents (getStickyAbPriceLabel)
- Cron follow-up: continue on quota/pre-consume errors instead of break
- Prospect disclaimer UI + source selector; Vitest for chatCompletion fallback
- CI runs npm test; README and deploy checklist updated
pr.author: haynbroit-alt
